violations.description: General employee practices. — --Observed used cigarettes stored on single use gloves by the back door in the kitchen.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed soda bibs stored on the floor in the back storage area.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. A scoop handle in the pizza toppings was touching the food.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Topping scoop handles were stored in the toppings.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
